name: clinical-reports
description: Write comprehensive clinical reports including case reports (CARE guidelines), diagnostic reports (radiology/pathology/lab), clinical trial reports (ICH-E3, SAE, CSR), and patient documentation (SOAP, H&P, discharge summaries). Full support with templates, regulatory compliance (HIPAA, FDA, ICH-GCP), and validation tools.
capabilities: Generate 12 professional clinical report templates including case reports, SOAP notes, discharge summaries, and diagnostic reports
Validate case reports against CARE guidelines checklist with 12 required elements
Scan documents for 18 HIPAA identifiers to ensure proper de-identification
Check clinical trial reports for ICH-E3 structure compliance
Validate medical terminology and detect prohibited abbreviations from JCAHO list
Format adverse event data into publication-ready summary tables
author: davila7
securitySummary: Legitimate clinical documentation skill. All 589 static findings are false positives caused by pattern detection on medical documentation content. The skill contains 8 Python scripts for local text processing and validation. No network calls, no external command execution, no credential access, no obfuscated code.
valueStatement: Healthcare professionals need to create accurate, regulation-compliant clinical documentation but struggle with complex guidelines and verification. This skill provides CARE-compliant case report templates, HIPAA de-identification checks, and validation tools for clinical trial documents.
userTitle: Write clinical reports with compliance validation
limitations: Does not provide medical advice or clinical decision support
Does not connect to electronic health record systems
Does not validate medical coding against official terminologies (SNOMED, LOINC, ICD-10)
Templates require manual completion with patient-specific information

useCases.title: Publish case reports
useCases.description: Create CARE-compliant case reports for medical journal submission with proper de-identification

useCases.title: Document trial safety
useCases.description: Write SAE reports and clinical study reports meeting ICH-E3 and FDA regulatory requirements

useCases.title: Standardize documentation
useCases.description: Generate consistent radiology, pathology, and laboratory reports using professional templates

promptTemplates.title: Basic case report
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a clinical case report template for a patient with [condition]. Include sections for introduction, patient information, clinical findings, diagnostic assessment, treatment, and follow-up.

promptTemplates.title: Check compliance
promptTemplates.prompt: Check my clinical case report for HIPAA compliance. Identify any of the 18 protected health information identifiers that need to be removed or modified.

promptTemplates.title: Clinical trial document
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a serious adverse event report template for a clinical trial participant. Include all required elements for regulatory submission.

promptTemplates.title: Patient notes
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a SOAP note template for a [follow-up/initial] visit. Include subjective, objective, assessment, and plan sections with placeholders.

bestPractices: Always verify de-identification before sharing or publishing any clinical document
Obtain and document informed consent before creating case reports for publication
Use the validation scripts to check compliance before regulatory submission
antiPatterns: Publishing clinical documents without removing all 18 HIPAA identifiers
Skipping the informed consent documentation step for case reports
Submitting clinical trial reports without validating against ICH-E3 structure

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with all electronic health record systems?
faq.answer: This skill creates standalone documents in Markdown format. You can copy content to any EHR system that accepts text input.

faq.question: What are the word count requirements for case reports?
faq.answer: Most journals require 1500-3500 words for case reports. The validation script checks word count against these guidelines.

faq.question: Does this skill integrate with reference management tools?
faq.answer: The skill is designed to integrate with citation management skills for adding references to case reports.

faq.question: Is patient data stored or transmitted anywhere?
faq.answer: No. All processing happens locally on your machine. Patient data is never sent to external servers.

faq.question: What do I do if HIPAA identifiers are detected?
faq.answer: Review the violation report showing locations of potential identifiers. Remove, redact, or modify the information before publication.

faq.question: How does this compare to other medical writing tools?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on structured clinical documentation with built-in compliance validation. It complements general writing tools by providing medical-specific templates and checks.
